titles.title: I Have Fought the Good Fight, I Have Kept the Faith

verse.name: V1
verse.lines: There was a man named Paul Who was tested and was tried He suffered for the Gospel, But God was on his side And at the end of his road he has testimony; He said, "I have finished my course a crown awaits for me"

verse.name: C2
verse.lines: I have fought a good fight, I have kept the faith I've been thru some hards times Permitted by His grace The battles almost over, I have ran the race I have fought the good fight, I have kept the faith

verse.name: V3
